comments.text:
To fetch data from supabase, you have to write a javascript function using the Noodl.Variables.supabase client.

With Noodl AI, you can create a function with the following prompt as a base to work on :
"Create a function that uses supabase javascript client called Noodl.Variables.supabase to retrieve records from the table companies"

(which gave te result in the function node below)
Creates the Supabase client and stores it in a Noodl Variable
Set the localstorage keyName to save the AuthSession
Set the user profile table name

dynamicports.name: inputMappingScript

parameters.text: You don't have a conversation with USER !

dynamicports.name: inputMappingScript

parameters.html:
<textarea 
  id="chat-input-grow" 
  rows="0" 
  placeholder="Message..."
  style="
    width: 100%;
    height: 40px;
    min-height: 40px;
    max-height: 150px;
    resize: none;
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 10px 15px;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    outline: none;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 20px;
    overflow-y: hidden;
  "
></textarea>

<script>
  setTimeout(() => {
    const textarea = document.getElementById('chat-input-grow');
    if (textarea) {
      textarea.addEventListener('input', function() {
        // 1. Gestion de l'auto-agrandissement
        this.style.height = '40px';
        const newHeight = Math.min(this.scrollHeight, 80);
        this.style.height = newHeight + 'px';
        this.style.overflowY = this.scrollHeight > 80 ? 'auto' : 'hidden';
        
        // 2. CAPTURE DU TEXTE : On l'envoie dans une variable globale Noodl
        Noodl.Variables.myChatInput = this.value;
      });
    }
  }, 100);
</script>

dynamicports.name: inputMappingScript

parameters.html:
<textarea 
  id="chat-input-grow" 
  rows="1" 
  placeholder="Message..."
  style="
    width: 100%;
    height: 40px;
    min-height: 40px;
    max-height: 150px;
    resize: none;
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 10px 15px;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    outline: none;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 20px;
    overflow-y: hidden;
  "
></textarea>

<script>
  setTimeout(() => {
    const textarea = document.getElementById('chat-input-grow');
    if (textarea) {
      textarea.addEventListener('input', function() {
        // 1. Gestion de l'auto-agrandissement
        this.style.height = '40px';
        const newHeight = Math.min(this.scrollHeight, 90);
        this.style.height = newHeight + 'px';
        this.style.overflowY = this.scrollHeight > 90 ? 'auto' : 'hidden';
        
        // 2. CAPTURE DU TEXTE : On l'envoie dans une variable globale Noodl
        Noodl.Variables.myChatInput = this.value;
      });
    }
  }, 100);
</script>
